en: Use of equipment and operating resources must occur only after required inspections and defect correction.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 151(1)
Equipment inspection programs must include pre-use and regular inspections to eliminate defects.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 3a(1)4
Instruction on equipment use, methods, and protective measures must be provided for high-risk work.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 154(3)

Where inspection obligations exist and no specific inspection interval is prescribed, inspections must be carried out at least once per calendar year.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 151(2)
